description_long: This is a classic, retro-style van with a two-tone paint job featuring a mustard yellow lower body and a white upper section, topped with a gray roof. The van has a prominent roof rack holding a blue surfboard, suggesting a recreational or beach-going theme. The front displays a distinctive V-shaped design with a large, round emblem and split windshield, along with round headlights and a black bumper. The side windows are rectangular and numerous, providing ample visibility for passengers, while the wheels are small and set within black wheel arches. The rear of the van is simple, with a rectangular rear window, two taillights, and a license plate. Chrome details, such as the roof rack and side mirrors, add to the vintage aesthetic.
description: A retro, mustard yellow and white van with a roof rack carrying a blue surfboard, featuring multiple windows and classic chrome details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the van's mustard yellow body, white upper section, gray roof, roof rack with blue surfboard, and multiple rectangular windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the split windshield, V-shaped front design, round headlights, chrome emblem, and the surfboard centered on the roof rack.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the same color scheme, window arrangement, and surfboard on the roof.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rectangular rear window, taillights, license plate, and the surfboard on the roof rack.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
